input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get configmap mongod-config -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  mongod.conf: |
    storage:
      dbPath: /data/db
      wiredTiger:
        engineConfig:
          journalCompressor: zlib
    net:
      bindIpAll: true
    replication:
      replSetName: mongodb-replica
    security:
      authorization: enabled
      keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
    systemLog:
      verbosity: 1
    operationProfiling:
      mode: slowOp
      slowOpThresholdMs: 200
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"mongod.conf":"storage:\n  dbPath: /data/db\n  wiredTiger:\n    engineConfig:\n      journalCompressor: zlib\nnet:\n  bindIpAll: true\nreplication:\n  replSetName: mongodb-replica\nsecurity:\n  authorization: enabled\n  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile\nsystemLog:\n  verbosity: 1\noperationProfiling:\n  mode: slowOp\n  slowOpThresholdMs: 200\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongod-config","namespace":"mongodb"}}

admin-user-password   Opaque   1      90s

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d 2>&1
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'rs.status()' 2>&1
input.description: Get replica set status with auth

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'db.getSiblingDB("admin").system.users.find().toArray()' 2>&1

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "env:" | head -60
input.description: Check StatefulSet env vars for username hints

content.content:
env:
          - name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                key: password
                name: admin-user-password
          image: mongo:6.0.5
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
              - /bin/sh
              - -c
              - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"
                --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
            failureThreshold: 10
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 15
            successThreshold: 1
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          name: mongod

tool_use_result.stdout:
